description: CompositionLavendar T-shirt made of 100% polyester, is engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a V-neck, short sleeves, and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironGo by the graphic print and Just Do It with this T-shirt from nike. Crafted from soft polyester fabric and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this T-shirt offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.
